title: RJB Stone Sass and Belle Plain Wooden Heart Plaque for Personalisation
features: This Wooden Heart Plaque painted ivory white with distressed edges hanging from a jute string is perfect for a hobby project. You can paint anyting you like in the empty space on this heart, or it can be decorated with paint or simply used as it is decorating a door or wall. Dimensions: 12 x 12 cm
